name: Nowingi Solar Farm - Edify (KCI)
operational_notes: Australia's largest duration BESS — 8-hour: 300 MW / 2,400 MWh (vs prior AURES 1,200 MWh spec). EPBC 'not controlled action' Aug/Sep 2025. Construction target 2026 (18-month build, ~250 jobs). No EPC or FC news surfaced Jul 2026. Pre-FID at ~10 months post-award. Same Edify (La Caisse-owned) proponent as Guthrie's Gap + Smoky Creek (which reached FC 20 May 2026) — Nowingi is the third of Edify's T4 non-NSW wins, still pre-FC as of Jul 2026.

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: Australia's largest DURATION BESS at 8-hour (2,400 MWh vs prior 1,200 MWh spec). EPBC 'not controlled action' Aug/Sep 2025. Construction target 2026, 18-month build. No EPC/FC news surfaced Jul 2026. Third of Edify's T4 non-NSW wins — Guthrie's Gap + Smoky Creek both reached FC 20 May 2026 (Rio Tinto offtake); Nowingi is the outlier still pre-FC.
